- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up view shows the top portion of a dark, rounded object or animal-like form against a light background.

Setting:
The background is plain and light-colored, likely indoors or under soft indoor lighting, with no other environment details visible.

Visual Details:
The image is tightly cropped, with the subject filling most of the frame. Lighting appears soft and even, with slight blur and low detail typical of a low-resolution or out-of-focus image. The subject has a matte, textured look with darker patches.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a very close, low-detail view of a dark rounded form with a textured surface. The rest of the scene is minimal, showing only a light background and the partial subject.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
